title: Mature Outcomes of 61.2 Gy Concomitant Boost Thoracic Radiation Therapy in Limited-Stage Small Cell Lung Cancer: CALGB 30610 (Alliance)/RTOG 0538.
abstract: We report mature outcomes of patients with limited-stage small cell lung cancer randomly assigned to the 61.2 Gy concomitant boost (CB) thoracic radiation therapy (TRT) arm of Cancer and Leukemia Group B (CALGB) 30610/Radiation Therapy Oncology Group (RTOG) 0538. The CB arm was discontinued after planned interim analysis; however, the study provides the largest prospective data set using 61.2 Gy CB TRT.
journal: Int J Radiat Oncol Biol Phys
